description: Datadog provides a cloud observability and security platform for monitoring infrastructure, applications, logs, traces, user experience, incidents, and related operational data. It also offers AI-oriented access paths such as a remote MCP server and an agent-friendly CLI for interacting with Datadog resources.
summary: Datadog exposes a regional REST HTTP API, a remote MCP server for AI clients, and the Pup CLI; authentication is via Datadog API/application keys, MCP OAuth, or Pup OAuth/stateless bearer auth depending on surface.
